reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y limpieza d los baños. Quiero destacar las opciones SIN TACC dulces y SALADAS (q no es poco ) una heladera c un montón d opciones aptas(frías y calientes). La verdad se agradece y ojalá sigan el ejemplo otras estaciones

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and clean restrooms. I want to highlight the gluten-free options, both sweet and savory (which is no small feat), and a refrigerator stocked with a wide variety of suitable items (both hot and cold). It's truly appreciated, and I hope other stations follow suit.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su comentario, los esperamos pronto

reviews.comment:
Carisimos los precios, 2 lucas una botella de agua de litro y medio que en Día está 700 mangos. La atención ni siquiera acompaña el ojo de la cara que te cuesta consumir algo ahí. No volvería.

(Translated by Google)
The prices are outrageous; a 1.5-liter bottle of water costs 2,000 pesos, while at Día it's 700. The service is terrible, and the price of anything there is exorbitant. I wouldn't go back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxNXFTekNBEAE

Pero a Gualberto le gusto la pizzetita

Excellent service. The biggest milanesa sandwich. Perfect for sharing. But Gualberto liked the small pizza too.

reviews.comment:
Mucha espera para un café cuando era la única esperando. Las medialunas parecían del día anterior.

(Translated by Google)
It was a long wait for a coffee, even though I was the only one waiting. The croissants looked like they were from the day before.
